mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (shop_id, title, description, handle, status, vendor, product_type, published_at, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{shopId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{handle}, #{status}, #{vendor}, #{productType}, #{publishedAt}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})

INSERT INTO product_variant (shop_id, product_id, sku, title, price_amount, price_currency, position, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{shopId}, #{productId}, #{sku}, #{title}, #{priceAmount}, #{priceCurrency}, #{position}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, shop_id, title, description, handle, status, vendor, product_type, published_at, created_at, updated_at FROM product WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND id = #{id}

SELECT id, shop_id, product_id, sku, title, price_amount, price_currency, position, created_at, updated_at FROM product_variant WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY position, id
SELECT id, shop_id, product_id, sku, title, price_amount, price_currency, position, created_at, updated_at FROM product_variant WHERE shop_id = #{shopId} AND id = #{id}
